entry.title: гҖҗI Am Part-time Worker!! | еғ•гҖҒгӮўгғ«гғҗгӮӨгғҲгӮ©гӮ©пјҒпјҒгҖ‘Employee of the Month Coyo Here!гҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘

media:group.media:title: гҖҗI Am Part-time Worker!! | еғ•гҖҒгӮўгғ«гғҗгӮӨгғҲгӮ©гӮ©пјҒпјҒгҖ‘Employee of the Month Coyo Here!гҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘
media:group.media:description:
I Am Part-time Worker | еғ•гҖҒгӮўгғ«гғҗгӮӨгғҲгӮ©гӮ©пјҒпјҒ https://store.steampowered.com/app/2985930/_/?l=japanese
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Opening screen Illustrator/animator: гғ„гӮҜгӮҰгғ«гғ•гғ«ж§ҳ (@kemopuffin) в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Hello Coyo! гҒҠгҒҜгӮігғЁгғјпјҒItвҖҷs Coyo here!
I am a Coyote from Japari Park and it is a pleasure to meet everyone from around the world! My main language is English, and sometimes I speak in Japanese. Other languages are also welcomed in chat but IвҖҷm sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~рҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫ
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
рҹҗәгҖҗSocialгҖ‘рҹҗә https://twitter.com/Coyote_KEMOV
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
рҹҗәгҖҗRulesгҖ‘рҹҗә рҹҢҹPlease refrain from arguments in the chat рҹҢҹNo slandering or malicious comments рҹҢҹBe kind and respect each other; letвҖҷs keep it a safe and friendly space! рҹҢҹIf you see spam, or malicious comments, please do not respond to them; please block, report, and ignore these comments рҹҢҹPlease refrain from having discussions on topics unrelated to the stream рҹҢҹPlease do not compare friends and other streamers, inciting conflicts рҹҢҹPlease do not bring up other streamersвҖҷ names unless I talk about them and vice versa рҹҢҹPlease do not share unauthorized URLs рҹҢҹPlease refrain from backseating unless I ask for help, and please no spoilers!
For those who do not follow these roles, you will face the wrath of the BONK HAMMER! Let's maintain good manners and HAVE FUN TOGETHER!
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
рҹҗәгҖҗKemoV Official / Kemono Friends Vtuber ProjectгҖ‘рҹҗә https://en.kemov-project.com/ https://twitter.com/KEMOVP_staff
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
рҹҗәгҖҗTagsгҖ‘рҹҗә Live: #howlcast Art: #coyoart Memes: #coyomeme Fan Name: Coyodachi Oshi Mark: рҹҗәрҹҗҫ Group: #KemoV/#гҒ‘гӮӮV Mascot: #coyopotato General: #CoyoteKemoV
#ENvtuber
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
For Inquiries вҶ’ info@kemono-friends.jp

media:group.media:title: гҖҗTEKKEN 8гҖ‘Toxic Time (with permission)! TEKKEN TUESDAYгҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘#tekken #йү„жӢі8
media:group.media:description:
Sorry for some of the scuff. Got a new monitor and need to figure out some of the set up! Everyone is welcomed to join as long as you follow the rules! Feel free to ask questions!
SESSIONS: 1) session: Coyodachi 2) pw: 5454 3) once you enter, put yourself on "STAY" 4) we go in order of who enters first listed via chatlog 5) Coyo will call up who is next 6) ONLY fight against me (coyo); one match per person 7) leave session after your match with me so others can join
TEKKENв„ў8 & В©Bandai Namco Entertainment Inc. в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Opening screen Illustrator/animator: гғ„гӮҜгӮҰгғ«гғ•гғ«ж§ҳ (@kemopuffin) в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Hello Coyo! гҒҠгҒҜгӮігғЁгғјпјҒItвҖҷs Coyo here!
I am a Coyote from Japari Park and it is a pleasure to meet everyone from around the world! My main language is English, and sometimes I speak in Japanese. Other languages are also welcomed in chat but IвҖҷm sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~рҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫ
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
рҹҗәгҖҗSocialгҖ‘рҹҗә https://twitter.com/Coyote_KEMOV
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
рҹҗәгҖҗRulesгҖ‘рҹҗә рҹҢҹPlease refrain from arguments in the chat рҹҢҹNo slandering or malicious comments рҹҢҹBe kind and respect each other; letвҖҷs keep it a safe and friendly space! рҹҢҹIf you see spam, or malicious comments, please do not respond to them; please block, report, and ignore these comments рҹҢҹPlease refrain from having discussions on topics unrelated to the stream рҹҢҹPlease do not compare friends and other streamers, inciting conflicts рҹҢҹPlease do not bring up other streamersвҖҷ names unless I talk about them and vice versa рҹҢҹPlease do not share unauthorized URLs рҹҢҹPlease refrain from backseating unless I ask for help, and please no spoilers!
For those who do not follow these roles, you will face the wrath of the BONK HAMMER! Let's maintain good manners and HAVE FUN TOGETHER!
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
рҹҗәгҖҗKemoV Official / Kemono Friends Vtuber ProjectгҖ‘рҹҗә https://en.kemov-project.com/ https://twitter.com/KEMOVP_staff
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і

entry.title: гҖҗDrawing/CelebrationгҖ‘2 years of membership celebration! New channel stamp!гҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘

media:group.media:title: гҖҗDrawing/CelebrationгҖ‘2 years of membership celebration! New channel stamp!гҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘
media:group.media:description:
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Opening screen Illustrator/animator: гғ„гӮҜгӮҰгғ«гғ•гғ«ж§ҳ (@kemopuffin) в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Hello Coyo! гҒҠгҒҜгӮігғЁгғјпјҒItвҖҷs Coyo here!
I am a Coyote from Japari Park and it is a pleasure to meet everyone from around the world! My main language is English, and sometimes I speak in Japanese. Other languages are also welcomed in chat but IвҖҷm sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~рҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫ
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
рҹҗәгҖҗSocialгҖ‘рҹҗә https://twitter.com/Coyote_KEMOV
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
рҹҗәгҖҗRulesгҖ‘рҹҗә рҹҢҹPlease refrain from arguments in the chat рҹҢҹNo slandering or malicious comments рҹҢҹBe kind and respect each other; letвҖҷs keep it a safe and friendly space! рҹҢҹIf you see spam, or malicious comments, please do not respond to them; please block, report, and ignore these comments рҹҢҹPlease refrain from having discussions on topics unrelated to the stream рҹҢҹPlease do not compare friends and other streamers, inciting conflicts рҹҢҹPlease do not bring up other streamersвҖҷ names unless I talk about them and vice versa рҹҢҹPlease do not share unauthorized URLs рҹҢҹPlease refrain from backseating unless I ask for help, and please no spoilers!
For those who do not follow these rules, you will face the wrath of the BONK HAMMER! Let's maintain good manners and HAVE FUN TOGETHER!

media:group.media:title: гҖҗRUSTгҖ‘My House is ... Coyover?! #зҢ«йҜ–rustгҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘
media:group.media:description:
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Opening screen Illustrator/animator: гғ„гӮҜгӮҰгғ«гғ•гғ«ж§ҳ (@kemopuffin) в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Hello Coyo! гҒҠгҒҜгӮігғЁгғјпјҒItвҖҷs Coyo here!
I am a Coyote from Japari Park and it is a pleasure to meet everyone from around the world! My main language is English, and sometimes I speak in Japanese. Other languages are also welcomed in chat but IвҖҷm sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~рҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫ
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і

For those who do not follow these roles, you will face the wrath of the BONK HAMMER! Let's maintain good manners and HAVE FUN TOGETHER!

media:group.media:title: гҖҗTEKKEN 8гҖ‘Lidia is here! TEKKEN TUESDAYгҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘#tekken #йү„жӢі8
media:group.media:description:
Everyone is welcomed to join as long as you follow the rules! Feel free to ask questions!
SESSIONS: 1) session: Coyodachi 2) pw: 5454 3) once you enter, put yourself on "STAY" 4) we go in order of who enters first listed via chatlog 5) Coyo will call up who is next 6) ONLY fight against me (coyo); one match per person 7) leave session after your match with me so others can join
TEKKENв„ў8 & В©Bandai Namco Entertainment Inc. в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Opening screen Illustrator/animator: гғ„гӮҜгӮҰгғ«гғ•гғ«ж§ҳ (@kemopuffin) в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Hello Coyo! гҒҠгҒҜгӮігғЁгғјпјҒItвҖҷs Coyo here!
I am a Coyote from Japari Park and it is a pleasure to meet everyone from around the world! My main language is English, and sometimes I speak in Japanese. Other languages are also welcomed in chat but IвҖҷm sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~рҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫ
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і

For those who do not follow these roles, you will face the wrath of the BONK HAMMER! Let's maintain good manners and HAVE FUN TOGETHER!

entry.title: гҖҗTEKKEN 8гҖ‘HE'S ALIVE?! Chat about EVO and T8 Training time!гҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘#tekken #йү„жӢі8

media:group.media:title: гҖҗTEKKEN 8гҖ‘HE'S ALIVE?! Chat about EVO and T8 Training time!гҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘#tekken #йү„жӢі8
media:group.media:description:
TEKKENв„ў8 & В©Bandai Namco Entertainment Inc. в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Opening screen Illustrator/animator: гғ„гӮҜгӮҰгғ«гғ•гғ«ж§ҳ (@kemopuffin) в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Hello Coyo! гҒҠгҒҜгӮігғЁгғјпјҒItвҖҷs Coyo here!
I am a Coyote from Japari Park and it is a pleasure to meet everyone from around the world! My main language is English, and sometimes I speak in Japanese. Other languages are also welcomed in chat but IвҖҷm sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~рҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫ

I am a Coyote from Japari Park and it is a pleasure to meet everyone from around the world! My main language is English, and sometimes I speak in Japanese. Other languages are also welcomed in chat but IвҖҷm sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~рҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫ

media:group.media:title: гҖҗTEKKEN 8гҖ‘Practice with Leo (Helpful advice welcomed)гҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘#tekken #йү„жӢі8
media:group.media:description:
Tekken Training Time. Labbing Leo!
TEKKENв„ў8 & В©Bandai Namco Entertainment Inc. в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Opening screen Illustrator/animator: гғ„гӮҜгӮҰгғ«гғ•гғ«ж§ҳ (@kemopuffin) в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Hello Coyo! гҒҠгҒҜгӮігғЁгғјпјҒItвҖҷs Coyo here!
I am a Coyote from Japari Park and it is a pleasure to meet everyone from around the world! My main language is English, and sometimes I speak in Japanese. Other languages are also welcomed in chat but IвҖҷm sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~рҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫ
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
рҹҗәгҖҗSocialгҖ‘рҹҗә https://twitter.com/Coyote_KEMOV
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
рҹҗәгҖҗRulesгҖ‘рҹҗә рҹҢҹPlease refrain from arguments in the chat рҹҢҹNo slandering or malicious comments рҹҢҹBe kind and respect each other; letвҖҷs keep it a safe and friendly space! рҹҢҹIf you see spam, or malicious comments, please do not respond to them; please block, report, and ignore these comments рҹҢҹPlease refrain from having discussions on topics unrelated to the stream рҹҢҹPlease do not compare friends and other streamers, inciting conflicts рҹҢҹPlease do not bring up other streamersвҖҷ names unless I talk about them and vice versa рҹҢҹPlease do not share unauthorized URLs рҹҢҹPlease refrain from backseating unless I ask for help, and please no spoilers!
For those who do not follow these roles, you will face the wrath of the BONK HAMMER! Let's maintain good manners and HAVE FUN TOGETHER!
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
рҹҗәгҖҗKemoV Official / Kemono Friends Vtuber ProjectгҖ‘рҹҗә https://en.kemov-project.com/ https://twitter.com/KEMOVP_staff
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
рҹҗәгҖҗTagsгҖ‘рҹҗә Live: #howlcast Art: #coyoart Memes: #coyomeme Fan Name: Coyodachi Oshi Mark: рҹҗәрҹҗҫ Group: #KemoV/#гҒ‘гӮӮV Mascot: #coyopotato General: #CoyoteKemoV
#ENvtuber
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
For Inquiries вҶ’ info@kemono-friends.jp

entry.title: гҖҗRUSTгҖ‘First time playing RUST! Let's make friends! #зҢ«йҜ–rustгҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘

I am a Coyote from Japari Park and it is a pleasure to meet everyone from around the world! My main language is English, and sometimes I speak in Japanese. Other languages are also welcomed in chat but IвҖҷm sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~рҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫ

For those who do not follow these roles, you will face the wrath of the BONK HAMMER! Let's maintain good manners and HAVE FUN TOGETHER!

media:group.media:title: гҖҗTEKKEN 8гҖ‘Serious Coyo! TEKKEN TUESDAYгҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘#tekken #йү„жӢі8
media:group.media:description:
Practice/ranked for about 1-1.5hrs and then will have session and tourney today!
Everyone is welcomed to join as long as you follow the rules! Feel free to ask questions!
SESSIONS: 1) session: Coyodachi 2) pw: 5454 3) once you enter, put yourself on "STAY" 4) we go in order of who enters first listed via chatlog 5) Coyo will call up who is next 6) ONLY fight against me (coyo); one match per person 7) leave session after your match with me so others can join
TEKKENв„ў8 & В©Bandai Namco Entertainment Inc. в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Opening screen Illustrator/animator: гғ„гӮҜгӮҰгғ«гғ•гғ«ж§ҳ (@kemopuffin) в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Hello Coyo! гҒҠгҒҜгӮігғЁгғјпјҒItвҖҷs Coyo here!
I am a Coyote from Japari Park and it is a pleasure to meet everyone from around the world! My main language is English, and sometimes I speak in Japanese. Other languages are also welcomed in chat but IвҖҷm sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~рҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫ
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і

media:group.media:description:

Everyone is welcomed to join as long as you follow the rules! Feel free to ask questions!
SESSIONS: 1) session: Coyodachi 2) pw: 5454 3) once you enter, put yourself on "STAY" 4) we go in order of who enters first listed via chatlog 5) Coyo will call up who is next 6) ONLY fight against me (coyo); one match per person 7) leave session after your match with me so others can join

Other languages are also welcomed in chat but IвҖҷm sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! media:group.media:description:
Installing new RAM, GPU, PSU and transferring my other parts! I'll need Coyodachi's help!
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Opening screen Illustrator/animator: гғ„гӮҜгӮҰгғ«гғ•гғ«ж§ҳ (@kemopuffin) в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Hello Coyo! гҒҠгҒҜгӮігғЁгғјпјҒItвҖҷs Coyo here!
I am a Coyote from Japari Park and it is a pleasure to meet everyone from around the world! My main language is English, and sometimes I speak in Japanese. Other languages are also welcomed in chat but IвҖҷm sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~рҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫ

media:group.media:title: гҖҗTEKKEN 8гҖ‘Don't get sent to Coyo Prison. TEKKEN TUESDAYгҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘#tekken #йү„жӢі8
media:group.media:description:
Session and tourney today!
Everyone is welcomed to join as long as you follow the rules! Feel free to ask questions!
SESSIONS: 1) session: Coyodachi 2) pw: 5454 3) once you enter, put yourself on "STAY" 4) we go in order of who enters first listed via chatlog 5) Coyo will call up who is next 6) ONLY fight against me (coyo); one match per person 7) leave session after your match with me so others can join

I am a Coyote from Japari Park and it is a pleasure to meet everyone from around the world! My main language is English, and sometimes I speak in Japanese. Other languages are also welcomed in chat but IвҖҷm sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! entry.title: гҖҗShinkansen 0 | ж–°е№№з·ҡ 0еҸ·гҖ‘Coyote Traveling Alone on a Bullet TrainгҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘

media:group.media:title: гҖҗShinkansen 0 | ж–°е№№з·ҡ 0еҸ·гҖ‘Coyote Traveling Alone on a Bullet TrainгҖҗ#Coyote / #KemoVгҖ‘
media:group.media:description:
Shinkansen 0 | ж–°е№№з·ҡ 0еҸ· https://store.steampowered.com/app/2793370/Chillas_Art_Shinkansen_0___0/
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Opening screen Illustrator/animator: гғ„гӮҜгӮҰгғ«гғ•гғ«ж§ҳ (@kemopuffin) в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і Hello Coyo! гҒҠгҒҜгӮігғЁгғјпјҒItвҖҷs Coyo here!
I am a Coyote from Japari Park and it is a pleasure to meet everyone from around the world! My main language is English, and sometimes I speak in Japanese. Other languages are also welcomed in chat but IвҖҷm sorry if I am unable to understand - I am still studying multiple languages and hope to understand more in the future! I am looking forward to spending time with everyone!~рҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫрҹҗҫ
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
рҹҗәгҖҗSocialгҖ‘рҹҗә https://twitter.com/Coyote_KEMOV
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
рҹҗәгҖҗRulesгҖ‘рҹҗә рҹҢҹPlease refrain from arguments in the chat рҹҢҹNo slandering or malicious comments рҹҢҹBe kind and respect each other; letвҖҷs keep it a safe and friendly space! рҹҢҹIf you see spam, or malicious comments, please do not respond to them; please block, report, and ignore these comments рҹҢҹPlease refrain from having discussions on topics unrelated to the stream рҹҢҹPlease do not compare friends and other streamers, inciting conflicts рҹҢҹPlease do not bring up other streamersвҖҷ names unless I talk about them and vice versa рҹҢҹPlease do not share unauthorized URLs рҹҢҹPlease refrain from backseating unless I ask for help, and please no spoilers!
For those who do not follow these roles, you will face the wrath of the BONK HAMMER! Let's maintain good manners and HAVE FUN TOGETHER!
в–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–ів–јв–і
